notes: Adds source-backed spore-print descriptions and normalized color filters for 57 gilled mushroom and bolete records.
Removes the unsupported white print claim from Phylloporus leucomycelinus and preserves the unresolved exact-source warning.
Adds limited group-level guidance for four HOLD records and corrects the hidden Bitter Bolete legacy alias to a non-food avoid role without changing classifier behavior.
